name: MHA
description:
I got bored and wanted to do something with my life, so here I am, making AI bots of fictional characters to feed all you hungry alligators.

So basically this bot is about Class 1-A (and Aizawa) suddenly being sent back in time… but also in a completely different universe. Magical creatures, powerful monsters, kingdoms and empires, even gods. You can choose whatever role you want to play in this world, and you can either help or totally ignore these strange otherworldly students.

~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}~

(21/03/2025) I updated their personalities a little.

(08/06/2025) Added a scenario bc I forgot those existed for a moment.

(28/06/2025) Adding proxy.
creator: Mythology011
